subcodes.first_line: The clouds have gathered upon the face of the sky, and verily, though they interpose between the sun and its radiance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد تراکمت السحاب علی وجه السما و انها لو حالت بین الشمس و اشراقها علی
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @wisdom [hikmat], @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
